generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on the permanent magnet synchronous motor of the MABI MAX 100 robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind the cycloidal gearbox of the MABI MAX 100 robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor integrated in Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller measuring motor current (I_M)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance AngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
]

instance AccelerationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
]

instance TorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw position data from motor encoder of MABI MAX 100 robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, SysMLEnabler
]

instance SecondaryEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw position data from secondary encoder of MABI MAX 100 robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, SysMLEnabler
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor current (I_M) measurements streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity derived from encoder position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Acceleration derived from encoder position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AccelerationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque derived from motor current and position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool for structural description of MABI MAX 100 robot system"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink simulation environment for dynamic friction modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for data linking between physical and virtual twins"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLinkingService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from physical sensors to virtual twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance DashboardTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tool for unified real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance SysMLBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of MABI MAX 100 robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance SysMLIBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of MABI MAX 100 robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model in MATLAB Simulink for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model in MATLAB Simulink for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model in MATLAB Simulink for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model in MATLAB Simulink for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Structural modeling service using SysML BDD and IBD"
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralModelInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelRefinementInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of robot joint friction and motion data in unified dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance DataLinkingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data linking service using Asset Administration Shells for traceability"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTraceabilityInsight
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming service via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStreamingInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enhancement of robot motion accuracy through friction model refinement"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyImprovementAction
]

instance StructuralModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural model of MABI MAX 100 robot first axis for system understanding"
]

instance FrictionModelRefinementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model identification results used to improve robot control accuracy"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of robot joint friction and motion data for decision making"
]

instance DataTraceabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Traceability of measured and simulated data to source sensors and models"
]

instance DataStreamingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming from physical sensors to virtual twin"
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting control parameters based on deviation between simulated and measured data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot with permanent magnet synchronous motor, gearwheel, and cycloidal gearbox"
]

instance RobotSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Industrial environment for MABI MAX 100 robot first axis operations"
    base:contains MABIMAX100FirstAxis, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, MotorCurrentSensor, SysMLEnabler, SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler, MQTTEnabler, DashboardTool
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming via MQTT with continuous updates for friction model identification and visualization during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of structural SysML models, behavioral Simulink models, live sensor data via MQTT, Asset Administration Shells for traceability, and a unified dashboard for visualization, forming a passive digital shadow for the first axis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, with continuous monitoring during robot operation to track friction changes due to wear, varying tools, and applications."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data from the physical robot to the digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for industrial IoT data exchange and SysML for systems engineering modeling."
]
